findings.issue: Persona-capability alignment is exceptionally tight — every capability reflects Pedro Marafiotti's community-builder identity
Glossary-first principle creates a clear epistemic contract with 4-level confidence system
Community feedback loop through Term Proposal — agent improves its own knowledge base through teaching
Memory system well-structured with 5 focused files, clear load-on-activation vs load-on-demand separation
Autonomous wake adds genuine utility — scanning git changes for Solana concepts and generating context briefings
No data integrity/recovery behavior when glossary data or sidecar memory is corrupt/missing/version-mismatched
findings.fix: Add graceful degradation instructions to On Activation for missing/corrupt data scenarios

findings.issue: Context Injection lacks output delivery mechanism — describes what output looks like but not how developer receives it
findings.fix: Specify delivery: file output, clipboard, or inline in conversation

findings.issue: Knowledge Graph has no script for traversal — relies entirely on LLM runtime JSON walking
findings.fix: Consider a graph-walk script for deterministic traversal

findings.issue: No proposal lifecycle management — create-only workflow, no browse/edit/delete/mark-submitted
findings.fix: Add proposal management commands in term-proposal.md

findings.issue: Save Memory is a 12-line stub overlapping with memory-system.md automatic persistence
i18n depth is uneven — claims native pt/es/en but Spanish gets no dedicated examples or catchphrases
findings.fix: Add at least one Spanish catchphrase example

findings.issue: Spaced repetition — per-term review scheduling would supercharge quiz effectiveness
findings.fix: Phase 2: add spaced repetition to quiz-mode.md

findings.issue: Collaborative learning mode — team knowledge coverage maps
Proactive code scanning — Code Walkthrough could scan developer's active project for Solana patterns
